entries.text: Your attention please--
last call for the Walt Disney World Railroad,
Now departing for a grand circle tour around the Magic Kingdom.
Last Call.
Board!
Your attention please--
The Walt Disney World Railroad now boarding for a scenic trip around the Magic Kingdom.
All aboooooard!
Welcome aboard Folks! We're beginning a grand circle tour of the Magic Kingdom!
With stops along the way in Frontierland and Fantasyland!
Sit tight, and keep your hands, arms, feet, and legs well inside the train.
We're currently departing Main Street Station, and if you're missing those friendly faces already, not to worry!
On this train it's never Goodbye. It's always See Ya Real Soon!
Para su seguridad, permanezcan sentados y mantengan las manos, brazos, pies y piernas, dentro del tren.
Y cuide a los pequeños. Gracias.
Friends, I'm so delighted you've joined us today.
There's nothing I enjoy more than showing folks around this Magic Kingdom!
Especially 'cause it's certified proof that in these parts, dreams really do come true!
See there was a time, not so long ago, that I was just a young fella on Main Street.
With a balloon in my hand and a wish in my heart.
That someday, I'd be the conductor of this train.
And wouldn't you know it. With a bit of gumption and a dash of magic, here I am!
So believe it when I say that around here, anything is possible.
See what I mean? Hope you packed your compass because that, folks, is the sound of Adventure!
Uhh, Adventureland, I should say.
Whether navigating wild jungle rivers, swashbuckling with jolly buccaneers, or even just scaling a towering treehouse.
There's always plenty to explore here in Adventureland!
Now if you're more of the rootin'-tootin' type, then partner saddle up!
'Cause this here's Frontierland!
Home to cowfolks, campfires and country bears.
This outpost is full of tall tales, and even taller mountains.
Yonder is Big Thunder Mountain and its runaway mine train!
While just ahead is Splash Mountain, where you'll find Br'er Rabbit in his Laughing Place!
So be sure to say "Hi", those critters love when folks drop in!
We've reached Frontierland Station everyone!
So sit tight, and hold those horses until we come to a complete stop.
If you're disembarking, please carry your strollers all the way off the platform before unfolding them.
That'll help make room for any new buckaroos!
Watch your step now! This is Frontierland Station!
Your attention please--
The Walt Disney World Railroad now boarding for a scenic trip around the Magic Kingdom.
All aboooooard!
Your attention please--
last call for the Walt Disney World Railroad,
Now departing for a grand circle tour around the Magic Kingdom.
Last Call.
Board!
Howdy Folks! If you're just joining us, a hearty welcome aboard!
We're heading for our next stop, Fantasyland! Before carrying on to Main Street U.S.A!
Everybody stay seated and keep your hands and arms, feet, and legs safely inside the train.
And as always, keep an eye on your little ones.
Para su seguridad, permanezcan sentados y mantengan las manos, brazos, pies y piernas, dentro del tren.
Y cuide a los pequeños. Gracias.
Those of you who have been riding with me for a spell, already know how much I love minding this railroad.
But for those times I'm fixing for something a bit wilder, Big Thunder Mountain is the place!
'Cause there, the trains have a mind of their own!
The change in scenery means we've left the rattle and rumble of that old gold mine behind and entered my favorite leg of the journey!
Lush wilderness, calm waters, and untamed beauty.
Folks, we're in nature's wonderland! Isn't it something?
Just think of the extraordinary things to see and do in these woods!
Hiking trails, bird calls, fireflies, and starry nights!
Setting out for adventure at sunrise, and telling the tale around the campfire that night.
Considering how wonderful things are out here, I'm fortunate that some of my closest friends call it home!
That village is a truly special place.
Folks, we're just about out of the woods and into the forest!
The enchanted forest of Fantasyland!
Where magic-
Listen...
Hear that?
Peter Pan: There it is! On that big metal snake.
Wendy Darling: Oh Peter. That's not a snake. It's a train!
Peter Pan: Train huh? Well I think it's finally time I trained my shadow, to stay put!
Peter Pan: Hey! Get back here shadow!!
Peter Pan: Shadow!!
Wendy Darling: Oh Tinkerbell, we really must find some stronger thread.
Told ya it's enchanted! And not just the forest!
From the tips of castle spires, to the sands under the sea.
Magic and happily ever afters await around every corner in Fantasyland!
Friends! Travelers! Children of all ages!
We're coming down the track and headed straight for the stupendous, the sensational, the spectacularific, Fantasyland Storybook Circus!
This is the place to soar with Dumbo! Or join Goofy and his stunt plane for some airborne acrobatics.
This station is also your gateway to the rest of Fantasyland and Tomorrowland.
Now please wait until the train has come to a complete stop,
gather your juggling pins, unicycles and other belongings,
and carry your strollers away from that platform before unfolding them.
That way we can start loading up for the next leg of our trip.
For those disembarking, please watch your step and thanks for traveling with us. I hope you'll join us again real soon!
If you're staying aboard, our next stop is Main Street Station!
Your attention please--
The Walt Disney World Railroad now boarding for a scenic trip around the Magic Kingdom.
All aboooooard!
Your attention please--
last call for the Walt Disney World Railroad,
Now departing for a grand circle tour around the Magic Kingdom.
Last Call.
Board!
Looks like we're on our way, and I'm so glad to have you with us!
The next leg of our journey takes us to Main Street U.S.A!
We'll head for Frontierland after that.
Stay seated, and keep your hands and arms, feet and legs, inside the train at all times.
Oh, and please keep an eye on your children.
Para su seguridad, permanezcan sentados y mantengan las manos, brazos, pies y piernas, dentro del tren.
Y cuide a los pequeños. Gracias.
Next up is a place that's always ahead of the curve, and not just because we're on a straightaway.
Our metropolis of mechanical marvels, Tomorrowland!
As you know, I love this railroad about as much as a songbird loves the morning,
But I'm still awed by the rockets in Spaceport 75. The technology that-
COMPUTER: Unidentified users detected in upload conduit area.
COMPUTER: Scanning...
COMPUTER: Calculating...
COMPUTER: Locomotive maintaining trajectory.
COMPUTER: Intervention not required.
...innovate...
...brilliant...
And that's the secret that makes intergalactic travel possible!
So simple once you hear it, right? Heh Heh Heh
Yes sir, in this place of boundless optimism, the possibilities are endless!
You might say the sky's the limit, but even that is no obstacle in Tomorrowland!
Our trip around the Magic Kingdom is almost complete.
I can't thank you enough for spending part of your day with me,
and I hope you've enjoyed your journey as much as I have appreciated being a part of it.
We're now approaching our most charming destination, Main Street U.S.A!
A place where the only thing sweeter than the townsfolk, is the treats!
After our stop, we'll be heading for Frontierland, followed by a visit to Fantasyland!
For now, stay seated until our train comes to a complete stop.
Then pick up your belongings and carefully disembark.
If you have strollers to unfold, please take them all the way beyond the platform so new passengers can safely hop aboard.
It'd be mighty kind of you.
And while we're being neighborly, let's say we give our fellow travelers a friendly wave hello!
This is Main Street Station after all. Welcome to Main Street U.S.A!
